name: Team Marco
subject: Clinton is yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
This weekend Hillary Clinton, the candidate
of yesterday, relaunched her bid for the White House. She even
quoted "Yesterday" by The Beatles. Seriously... that happened.
That's why we had to put out this new video.
You're gonna want to watch this one...
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42525631:17585141538:m:3:1349778030:DC93179CB7D8FDAF53C6323B956E821F:r
You've read the stories. Democrats are
running scared at the thought of Marco as the Republican nominee.
He's the Clinton machine's worst nightmare. They get it.
The equation is simple: Fresh Ideas >
Yesterday
Please click here now, watch our brand new
video and consider chipping in $7 to help get Marco's fresh ideas
in front of every early state voter.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42525631:17585141538:m:3:1349778030:DC93179CB7D8FDAF53C6323B956E821F:r
Marco can't beat the Clintons alone. He needs
you. America needs you. Or else we return to yesterday. Please
click here now.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42525631:17585141538:m:3:1349778030:DC93179CB7D8FDAF53C6323B956E821F:r

Sincerely,

Team Marco

P.S. If you truly believe that yesterday is over, click here now.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42525631:17585141538:m:3:1349778030:DC93179CB7D8FDAF53C6323B956E821F:r

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: Jeb Bush, Jr.
subject: All Eyes On Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend, Dad put me in charge of the first day donor drive, and all eyes are on us.

We need to hit 5,000 Day One Supporters by midnight tonight to prove we’re serious about taking back the White House.

Once we hit the 24 hour mark, I have to report back and give Dad the update on who got in on day one, and I want your name on the list I hand him.

Friend, chip in $100, $50, $25, or even $5 to make sure you’re on that Day One Supporter List list.
The next few hours are critical.

The media, the chattering class, Bill & Hillary Clinton, everyone is watching to see how we do following yesterday’s launch.

We need you now, so chip in whatever you can right away, and show Dad and the Clintons he'll have what he needs to take back the White House: Jeb2016.com/Day-One

Thank you, Gracias and God Bless.

Jeb Jr.

P.S. I want Dad to see your name on the list of Day One supporters. Chip in before it's too late.
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.RighttoRisePac.org

www.RighttoRisePac.org

Right to Rise
PO Box 14349
Tallahassee, FL 32317

http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=736&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18

You can read the full sweepstakes rules here: https://www.righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb-official-rules/.

Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here: https://righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb/

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, click here: https://righttorisepac.org/join-jeb-miami/. To enter without making a contribution, click here: https://righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb/. Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Thursday, April 9, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Wednesday, April 22, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Wednesday, April 22, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets (one for the winner and one for a guest of the winner’s choice) within the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,000; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; two tickets to a local event with an approximate value of $1,000; lunch with Honorary Chairman Jeb Bush, with an approximate retail value of $50; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $2,275. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,275. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the official rules: https://www.righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb-official-rules/. The Sponsor is the Right to Rise PAC. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: My Story: The eBook
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Tomorrow, I'm releasing an eBook that details my path from
Central to Congress. "My Story" focuses on the people and places
I've gotten to know along the way and how they've shaped my life.

Friend,

Since the announcement in Central, we've been traveling all over
Iowa and New Hampshire talking about the need to secure our
nation and strengthen our resolve.

But it's not just a call-to-action, it's also an introduction.

Tomorrow, I'm releasing an eBook that details my path from
Central to Congress. "My Story" focuses on the people and places
I've gotten to know along the way and how they've shaped my life.

You can download a free copy for iOS and Kindle on Wednesday at
9:00am ET at www.LindseyGraham.com.

I hope you'll enjoy the journey,

Lindsey Graham

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW13Jxn1oN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW13Jxn1oN

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Founding Member Status
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend,

Let me first preface this by saying, I’m a big emailer. You’re going to be hearing from me a lot.

I apologize in advance.

So I’m just going to go ahead and forewarn you, I really just want you to have your finger on the pulse of what’s going on with the campaign.

We’re now 24 hours into the campaign. It’s been a great start, but I know we can do better. So I’m asking, will you become a Founding Member of my campaign by donating $100, $50, $25 or whatever you can afford?

http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rkgfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsklwt_mdbnnspw.html

Everyone is watching us in these initial moments. Hillary Clinton is counting on her Washington connections to lock this race, so I’m counting on you to help us take back the White House, and fight back: http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cglrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsgmqq_mdbnnspw.html

Can I count on you?

Thank you, Friend.

Jeb

P.S. Please chip in whatever you can afford, whether it’s $100, $50, or $25 and become a Founding Member today.

http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rktfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsklwl_mdbnnspw.html

Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.RighttoRisePac.org

www.RighttoRisePac.org

Right to Rise
PO Box 14349
Tallahassee, FL 32317
